overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a foggy wooden dock in Red Dead Redemption 2's Saint Denis port. The player character moves from a misty pier approach through a busy working dock area with NPC workers and fishermen, transitioning from enclosed covered structures to an open waterfront promenade bathed in golden hour sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy wooden pier approach with mooring posts

events.description: wooden shack with No Entry sign comes into view on the left, marking the entrance to the port facilities

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy pier, approaching the port entrance

entered.detail: weathered wooden railings lining both sides of the pier walkway
thick wooden bollards wrapped with red, white, and blue ropes
colorful mooring ropes stretching between posts
small wooden building with No Entry sign on the door
tall gothic church spire visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy wooden pier with limited visibility. The camera moves forward past weathered railings and thick mooring posts wrapped in colorful ropes. A small wooden shack with a No Entry sign appears on the left, signaling the entrance to the port facilities, while a distant church spire pierces through the haze ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy port entrance with administrative buildings

events.description: exits the narrow foggy approach and enters the open Port of Saint Denis dock area
slight turn to the right while passing the No Entry shack, heading toward the covered dock

agents.ego_description: walking through the port entrance, passing workers and pedestrians on the wooden planks

notable_agents.action: worker in suspenders standing near cargo sacks

entered.detail: large two-story wooden building with Port of Saint Denis signage and arched windows
open-air wooden shelter with support beams and stacked cargo
old wooden wagon with metal wheels parked on the dock
red and blue railway boxcars visible in the background
tall wooden post with hanging lantern and decorative brackets

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into the Port of Saint Denis, revealing a bustling dock area with a prominent administrative building on the left. The fog begins to clear as the camera moves past the No Entry shack, now on the right, toward a covered loading area. Workers and pedestrians populate the wooden planks, and railway cars are visible in the background, indicating active cargo operations.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered loading dock with cargo operations

events.description: enters the covered wooden loading dock structure, passing under the roof
exits the covered dock area into bright direct sunlight, creating strong silhouettes

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered dock area, passing workers loading and unloading cargo

notable_agents.action: worker in yellow suspenders leaning against cargo sacks

entered.detail: wooden pitched roof with exposed support beams providing partial cover
stacks of burlap sacks piled on the wooden dock floor
thick timber posts supporting the dock roof structure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the covered loading dock, where thick wooden beams support a pitched roof overhead. Workers in period clothing stand near stacks of cargo sacks, and a wooden cart sits parked to the side. The lighting shifts dramatically as the camera exits the covered area around 35 seconds, emerging into bright golden hour sunlight that silhouettes the figures ahead.

events.description: sun breaks through the fog completely, creating long shadows and silhouettes of fishermen

agents.ego_description: walking along the open pier, passing fishermen and dock workers against the bright sun

notable_agents.action: fisherman holding long fishing rod over the railing, silhouetted against the sun

entered.detail: large canvas-covered cargo containers and crates lining the left side
tall masts of sailing ships visible through the fog on the water

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a wide, sun-drenched pier with the camera moving toward the bright golden sun. Fishermen stand along the right railing, silhouetted against the glare, while cargo containers line the left side. The fog has cleared to reveal distant ship masts on the water, and the wooden planks stretch ahead toward the vanishing point, populated by scattered pedestrians and dock workers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, foggy pier into a wide, sun-drenched waterfront promenade. It begins by pushing through dense haze past weathered railings and mooring posts, passing a small shack with a No Entry sign as a distant church spire emerges from the mist. As the fog clears, the scene opens into the bustling Port of Saint Denis, moving past an administrative building and railway cars toward a covered loading area populated by workers. The camera then glides under heavy wooden beams and cargo sacks before emerging from the shadows into a dramatic shift of bright, golden hour sunlight. Finally, the view expands across a wide pier where silhouetted fishermen and distant ship masts are revealed under a clear, glowing sky.
